channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Mebius Dust Anime的 1st Main 预告PV 公开 More 声优阵容 & 制作阵容 Members, Ending Song, July 9 Debut
